segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Hello, Flanders conference hotel.
segments.zh: 您好，弗兰德斯会议酒店。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Oh, hi.
segments.zh: 哦，你好。我想咨询一下酒店的会议设施。我找对人了么？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I wanted to ask about conference facilities at the hotel.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Have I come through to the right person?

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: You have.
segments.zh: 没错。我是客户服务经理，我叫安吉拉。有什么可以帮您的？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: I'm the customer services manager.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: My name's Angela.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: So how can I help you?

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Well, I'm calling from Barrett and Stansons, we're a medical company based in Perth.
segments.zh: 嗯，我是从巴雷特和斯坦森公司打来的，我们是一家位于珀斯的医疗公司。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Oh yes.
segments.zh: 哦，好的。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And we're organising a conference for our clients to be held in Sydney.
segments.zh: 我们正在为客户组织一场在悉尼举行的会议。会议将持续两天，预计有五十到六十人参加。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: It'll be held over two days and we're expecting about fifty or sixty people.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: When were you thinking of having it?
segments.zh: 您打算什么时候举办？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Some time early next year, like the end of January?
segments.zh: 明年初，比如一月底？但必须是周末。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: It'd have to be a weekend.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Let me see ... our conference facilities are already booked for the weekend beginning January 28th.
segments.zh: 让我看看……我们1月28号那个周末的会议设施已经被预订了。我们可以定2月的第一个周末吗？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: We could do the first weekend in February?

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: How about January 21st?
segments.zh: 1月21号怎么样？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: I'm afraid that's booked too.
segments.zh: 恐怕那天也被订了。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Well, let's go for the February date then.
segments.zh: 好吧，那我们就定2月的那个日期吧。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: So that's the weekend beginning the 4th.
segments.zh: 那就是4号开始的周末。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。你能跟我说说你们有哪些会议设施吗？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Now can you tell me a bit about what conference facilities you have?

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 当然。演讲和演示的话，我们有特斯拉厅。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: So for talks and presentations we have the Tesla room.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Sorry?
segments.zh: 你说什么？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Tesla – that's spelled T-E-S-L-A.
segments.zh: 特斯拉厅——拼写是T-E-S-L-A。最多可容纳一百人，并且配有投影仪等设备。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: It holds up to a hundred people, and it's fully equipped with a projector and so on.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: How about a microphone?
segments.zh: 有麦克风吗？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Yes, that'll be all set up ready for you, and there'll be one that members of the audience can use too, for questions, if necessary.
segments.zh: 有的，会为您准备好，而且如果需要的话，还会有一个给观众提问用的麦克风。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Fine.
segments.zh: 好的。我们还需要一个开放的区域，人们可以坐下来喝杯咖啡，我们也想在那里展示我们的产品和服务，所以空间需要大一些。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And we'll also need some sort of open area where people can sit and have a cup of coffee, and we'd like to have an exhibition of our products and services there as well, so that'll need to be quite a big space.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: That's fine, there's a central atrium with all those facilities, and you can come before the conference starts if you want to set everything up.
segments.zh: 没问题，有一个中央中庭，具备所有这些设施，如果您想提前布置，可以在会议开始前来。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Great.
segments.zh: 太好了。我想应该有无线网络吧？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: And I presume there's wifi?

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Oh yes, that's free and available throughout the hotel.
segments.zh: 哦，有的，免费提供，酒店各处都有。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Would you also like us to provide a buffet lunch?
segments.zh: 您是否也希望我们提供自助午餐？我们可以做两道菜的套餐，有多种选择。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: We can do a two-course meal with a number of different options.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: What sort of price are we looking at for that?
segments.zh: 那大概是什么价位？

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Well, I can send you a copy of the standard menu.
segments.zh: 嗯，我可以给您发一份标准菜单的副本。标准的是每人45美元。或者您也可以选择特色菜单，多加25美元。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: That's $45 per person.

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Or you can have the special for $25 more.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I think the standard should be OK, but yes, send me the menu.
segments.zh: 我觉得标准菜单应该就可以了，不过还是请把菜单发给我吧。

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: Now we're also going to need accommodation on the Saturday night for some of the participants ...
segments.zh: 另外，我们周六晚上还需要为一些参会者安排住宿……我不确定具体人数，但大概25人左右。那么房间怎么收费？

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: I'm not sure how many, but probably about 25.

segments.speaker: MAN
segments.en: So what do you charge for a room?

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Well, for conference attendees we have a 25% reduction, so we can offer you rooms at $135.
segments.zh: 嗯，对于会议参会者，我们有25%的折扣，所以可以给您135美元的房间。标准间通常是180美元。

segments.speaker: ANGELA
segments.en: Normally a standard room's $180.

items.prompt:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位答案。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的Tesla在原文中直接出现，且拼写被明确给出，因此答案就是Tesla。
